# Presence

A utility component for animating the mount and unmount of elements. Allows you to run exit animations before an element is removed from the DOM.

## Import

```jsx
import { Presence } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `present` | `boolean` | - | Whether the element should be present (mounted) in the DOM. |
| `onExitComplete` | `() => void` | - | Callback fired after the exit animation completes and the element is unmounted. |
| `animationName` | `string \| { enter: string, exit: string }` | - | The CSS animation name(s) for enter and exit transitions. |
| `children` | `ReactNode` | - | The content to animate. |

## Usage

### Basic Presence

```jsx
<Presence present={isVisible}>
  <Box p="4" bg="blue.100" borderRadius="md">
    This content fades in and out.
  </Box>
</Presence>
```

### With Exit Callback

```jsx
<Presence
  present={isOpen}
  onExitComplete={() => console.log("Animation finished")}
>
  <Box p="4">Animated content</Box>
</Presence>
```

### With Custom Animation

```jsx
<Presence
  present={show}
  animationName={{ enter: "fadeIn", exit: "fadeOut" }}
>
  <Box p="4">Custom animated content</Box>
</Presence>
```

### Toggle Example

```jsx
function AnimatedToggle() {
  const [show, setShow] = useState(false);

  return (
    <>
      <Button onClick={() => setShow(!show)}>Toggle</Button>
      <Presence present={show}>
        <Box mt="4" p="4" bg="green.100" borderRadius="md">
          I appear and disappear with animation!
        </Box>
      </Presence>
    </>
  );
}
```
